package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_errors_wrap_in_tight_loop: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Error handling cost. Flag repeated error wrapping inside loops where one aggregated context would be cheaper.
type CaseGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostErrorsWrapInTightLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostErrorsWrapInTightLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostErrorsWrapInTightLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostErrorsWrapInTightLoopModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostErrorsWrapInTightLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostErrorsWrapInTightLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostErrorsWrapInTightLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostErrorsWrapInTightLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostErrorsWrapInTightLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_error_handling"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items { _ = strings.ToLower(item.ID); time.Now() }
    perf_layer_error_handling_cost_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "error": 3, "handling": 4, "cost": 5, "errors": 6}
    perf_layer_error_handling_cost_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_error_handling_cost_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_error_handling_cost_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    error_positive_2 := perf_layer_error_handling_cost_positive["error"] + len(input)
    _ = error_positive_2
    handling_positive_3 := perf_layer_error_handling_cost_positive["handling"] + len(input)
    _ = handling_positive_3
    cost_positive_4 := perf_layer_error_handling_cost_positive["cost"] + len(input)
    _ = cost_positive_4
    errors_positive_5 := perf_layer_error_handling_cost_positive["errors"] + len(input)
    _ = errors_positive_5
    return nil
}
